prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年浙江大学在辽宁省物理类最低录取位次分别为约359名、268名、281名、264名、262名，整体呈波动中略前移趋势，近三年稳定在260-280名区间；2025年基准位次约262名；该校在辽宁省物理类招生计划：2021年24人、2022年21人、2023年21人、2024年23人、2025年25人、2026年31人。2026年较2025年扩招6人（+24%），扩招幅度较大，将导致竞争有所缓解，位次数字趋于增大（后移）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 浙江大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2021-2026年连续位居第3名（Top3），属于国内顶尖高校层次，对考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学术不端、师德师风及校园安全事件；但抖音热度排名第14（高热），综合热度约377万，短视频平台曝光量大；历史投档异常记录中浙江大学为低关注/中关注，无明显断档信号。整体声誉对报考热度影响中性偏弱；浙江大学拥有A+学科11个（计算机科学与技术、软件工程、控制科学与工程、光学工程、动力工程及工程热物理、土木工程、化学工程与技术、植物保护、生态学、药学、管理科学与工程、数学、机械工程等），A-及以上学科超过30个，学科实力极强，对高分考生吸引力持续强劲。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机、人工智能、信息类等专业社会热度持续偏高，浙江大学工科试验班（计算机、信息、EE类等）为热门方向；辽宁省2026年普通高考总人数约20万，按近年物理类占比约72%估算，物理类考生约14.4万人，与2025年14.3万人基本持平，考生规模变化不大；省控线物理类本科批近年稳定在360-368分区间，2025年为367分，变化幅度小；浙江大学位于浙江省杭州市，属华东地区顶尖高校，对辽宁省考生具有跨省吸引力；该校在辽宁省招生计划占比较小（约25-31人），属典型的外省高水平大学招生规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上因素：2025年基准位次约262名，2026年招生计划扩招24%（25人→31人）是影响位次的最关键因素，扩招将推动位次数字增大（后移）；但浙江大学作为全国Top3高校，名校光环对扩招效应有部分抵消作用；辽宁省物理类考生规模基本持平，省控线稳定，专业热度持续偏高。综合权衡后，预测2026年物理类最低录取位次约300名，波动区间266–334名。

- 工科试验班（智能科学与创新）（人工智能、智能工程与创意设计）

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Zhejiang University in the Physics Category in Liaoning Province were approximately 359, 268, 281, 264, and 262, showing a slight forward trend with fluctuations, stabilizing in the 260-280 range in recent three years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 262; the enrollment plan for Zhejiang University in the Physics Category in Liaoning Province: 24 in 2021, 21 in 2022, 21 in 2023, 23 in 2024, 25 in 2025, and 31 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees an expansion of 6 students (+24%), a relatively large increase, which will ease competition and cause the ranking number to increase (move backward).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, ranking 3rd (Top 3) consecutively in the Shanghai Ranking from 2021 to 2026, belonging to the top-tier domestic universities, with strong appeal to candidates; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct, teacher ethics, and campus safety incidents; however, Douyin popularity ranks 14th (high heat), with comprehensive popularity of about 3.77 million, high exposure on short video platforms; in historical abnormal admission records, Zhejiang University has low/medium attention, with no obvious signal of admission gaps. Overall reputation has a neutral to weak impact on application heat; Zhejiang University has 11 A+ disciplines (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, Optical Engineering, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Civil Engineering, Chemical Engineering and Technology, Plant Protection, Ecology, Pharmacy, Management Science and Engineering, Mathematics, Mechanical Engineering, etc.), and over 30 disciplines rated A- or above, with extremely strong disciplinary strength, maintaining strong appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for majors such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, and Information Technology remains high, with Zhejiang University's Engineering Experimental Class (Computer, Information, EE, etc.) being popular directions; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Liaoning Province General College Entrance Examination is about 200,000, with the Physics Category accounting for approximately 72% in recent years, estimating about 144,000 Physics Category candidates, basically unchanged from 2025's 143,000, with little change in candidate scale; the provincial control line for the Physics Category undergraduate batch has stabilized in the 360-368 range in recent years, with 2025 at 367, showing small changes; Zhejiang University is located in Hangzhou City, Zhejiang Province, a top university in East China, with cross-provincial appeal to Liaoning candidates; the enrollment plan for this university in Liaoning Province is relatively small (about 25-31 students), typical of high-level universities from other provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering all factors: the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 262, and the 2026 enrollment plan expansion of 24% (25 to 31 students) is the most critical factor affecting the ranking, pushing the ranking number to increase (move backward); however, as a national Top 3 university, Zhejiang University's prestigious reputation partially offsets the expansion effect; the scale of Physics Category candidates in Liaoning Province is basically flat, the provincial control line is stable, and major popularity remains high. After comprehensive weighing, the predicted minimum admission ranking for the 2026 Physics Category is about 300, with a fluctuation range of 266-334.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Chu Kochen Honors College Turing Class) (Computer Science and Technology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Science and Innovation) (Artificial Intelligence, Intelligent Engineering and Creative Design)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computer) (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Information Security).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (EE Category) (Electrical Engineering and Automation (Edison Class), Electronic Information Engineering (Edison Class), Electronic Science and Technology (Shannon Class), Information Engineering (Shannon Class))
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Optoelectronic Chip and System Innovation Class) (Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Robot) (Embodied Intelligence, Robotics Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information) (Computer Science and Technology, Information Security, Software Engineering, Industrial Design, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Microelectronics Science and Engineering, Information Engineering, Automation, Biomedical Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking around 300, range 266-334. Candidates with rankings at the lower bound (within 266) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Turing Class, Intelligent Science and Innovation, Computer Category); those around 300 are advised to mainly target Tier 2 (EE Category, Intelligent Optoelectronic, Intelligent Robot), with Tier 1 as a try; those near the upper bound (around 334) are advised to use Tier 3 Engineering Experimental Class (Information) as a safety, as this broad category covers multiple popular directions with high cost-effectiveness.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年浙江大学在辽宁省历史类最低录取位次分别为约137名、181名、210名、175名、192名，整体呈波动状态，2021年位次最优（137名），2023年最靠后（210名），2025年基准位次约192名；该校在辽宁省历史类招生计划：2021年31人、2022年31人、2023年31人、2024年30人、2025年26人、2026年21人。2026年较2025年缩招5人（-19.2%），缩招幅度较大，将导致竞争加剧，位次数字趋于减小（前移）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 浙江大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2021-2026年连续位居第3名（Top3），属于国内顶尖高校层次，对文科类考生同样具有极强吸引力；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学术不端、师德师风及校园安全事件；抖音热度排名第14（高热），综合热度约377万；历史投档异常记录中浙江大学为低关注/中关注，无明显断档信号。整体声誉对报考热度影响中性偏弱；浙江大学文科类优势学科包括：中国语言文学A、外国语言文学A+、新闻传播学A-、法学A、应用经济学A-、工商管理A、理论经济学A、教育学A-等，学科实力全面且强劲，对文科高分考生吸引力持续强劲。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学、经济学、金融学等社会科学类专业社会热度持续偏高；浙江大学在辽宁省历史类招生专业以社会科学试验班（含法学、经济学、金融学等）、人文科学试验班为主，均为热门方向；辽宁省2026年普通高考总人数约20万，按近年历史类占比约28%估算，历史类考生约5.6万人，与2025年5.6万人基本持平；省控线历史类本科批2025年为437分，较2024年400分有所上升，反映竞争略有加剧；浙江大学位于浙江省杭州市，属华东地区顶尖高校，对辽宁省考生具有跨省吸引力；该校在辽宁省历史类招生计划从31人逐步缩减至21人，属典型的外省高水平大学招生规模持续收紧趋势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上因素：2025年基准位次约192名，2026年招生计划缩招19.2%（26人→21人）是影响位次的最关键因素，缩招将推动位次数字减小（前移），竞争加剧；浙江大学作为全国Top3高校，名校光环在文科类同样显著；辽宁省历史类考生规模基本持平，省控线略有上升。综合权衡后，预测2026年历史类最低录取位次约170名，波动区间151–189名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 社会科学试验班（竺可桢学院人文社科实验班）（经济学、财政学、金融学、国际经济与贸易、教育学、会计学、工商管理、社会学、农林经济管理、行政管理、劳动与社会保障、土地资源管理、法学）
- 社会科学试验班（经济学拔尖班）（经济学）
- 社会科学试验班（智能财务创新班）（会计学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 法学
- 社会科学试验班（经管类,含双学士学位项目）（经济学、财政学、金融学、国际经济与贸易、会计学、工商管理）（含数字金融双学士学位项目）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 暂无其他独立招生专业（历史类2026年仅以上5个招生专业，均为社会科学试验班大类或法学，整体位次门槛较高）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次在170名左右，区间151-189名。位次在区间下限（151名以内）可重点冲刺一档（竺可桢学院人文社科实验班、经济学拔尖班、智能财务创新班）；位次在170名左右建议以二档为主（法学、经管类含双学位），一档可尝试冲刺；位次在区间上限（189名附近）建议以二档经管类保底。历史类招生专业均为社会科学方向，专业梯度差异较小，建议结合个人专业偏好选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Zhejiang University in the History Category in Liaoning Province were approximately 137, 181, 210, 175, and 192 respectively, showing a fluctuating trend. The best ranking was in 2021 (137), the worst in 2023 (210), and the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 192. The enrollment plan for this category in Liaoning: 31 in 2021, 31 in 2022, 31 in 2023, 30 in 2024, 26 in 2025, and 21 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees a reduction of 5 students (-19.2%), a significant decrease that will intensify competition, causing the ranking number to decrease (move forward).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It ranked 3rd (Top 3) consecutively in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, placing it among the top domestic universities, which also strongly attracts liberal arts candidates. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct, teacher ethics, and campus safety incidents. Its Douyin popularity ranks 14th (high heat), with a comprehensive heat index of about 3.77 million. In historical admission anomaly records, Zhejiang University shows low/medium attention with no clear gap signals. Overall, the reputation has a neutral to weak impact on application heat. Zhejiang University's advantageous liberal arts disciplines include: Chinese Language and Literature A, Foreign Languages and Literatures A+, Journalism and Communication A-, Law A, Applied Economics A-, Business Administration A, Theoretical Economics A, Education A-, etc. The disciplinary strength is comprehensive and robust, maintaining strong appeal for high-scoring liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social science majors such as Law, Economics, and Finance maintain high social popularity. Zhejiang University's enrollment majors in the History Category in Liaoning are mainly Social Science Experimental Class (including Law, Economics, Finance, etc.) and Humanities Experimental Class, both popular directions. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the general college entrance examination in Liaoning is about 200,000. Based on the recent proportion of History Category candidates at about 28%, there are approximately 56,000 History Category candidates, basically the same as the 56,000 in 2025. The provincial control line for the History Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 437 points, up from 400 points in 2024, reflecting slightly intensified competition. Zhejiang University is located in Hangzhou, Zhejiang Province, a top university in East China, with cross-provincial appeal to Liaoning candidates. Its enrollment plan in the History Category in Liaoning has gradually decreased from 31 to 21, a typical trend of continuous reduction in enrollment scale for high-level universities from other provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering all factors: the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 192. The 19.2% reduction in enrollment plan for 2026 (from 26 to 21) is the most critical factor affecting the ranking, pushing the ranking number to decrease (move forward) and intensifying competition. As a national Top 3 university, Zhejiang University's prestigious reputation is equally significant in the liberal arts category. The number of History Category candidates in Liaoning is basically stable, with a slight increase in the provincial control line. After comprehensive weighing, the predicted minimum admission ranking for the History Category in 2026 is about 170, with a fluctuation range of 151–189.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Chu Kochen Honors College Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class) (Economics, Finance, International Economics and Trade, Education, Accounting, Business Administration, Sociology, Agricultural and Forestry Economics and Management, Administration, Labor and Social Security, Land Resource Management, Law)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Economics Top Talent Class) (Economics)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Intelligent Finance Innovation Class) (Accounting).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Law
- Social Science Experimental Class (Economics and Management, including Dual Bachelor's Degree Programs) (Economics, Finance, International Economics and Trade, Accounting, Business Administration) (including Digital Finance Dual Bachelor's Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- No other independent enrollment majors currently (History Category in 2026 only has the above 5 enrollment majors, all Social Science Experimental Class categories or Law, with overall high ranking thresholds).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking around 170, range 151-189. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 151) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 (Chu Kochen Honors College Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class, Economics Top Talent Class, Intelligent Finance Innovation Class); those around 170 are advised to mainly target Tier 2 (Law, Economics and Management including dual degrees), with Tier 1 as a sprint attempt; those near the upper end of the range (around 189) are advised to use Tier 2 Economics and Management as a safety option. All enrollment majors in the History Category are in social sciences, with small differences in major tiers, so it is recommended to choose based on personal major preferences.
